overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in period clothing walking through the historic city of Saint Denis at night. The character moves from a train station plaza through covered sidewalks past shops and a theater, with gas lamps and warm building lights illuminating the cobblestone streets.

events.description: character walks out from under train station canopy into open plaza
character turns right to follow the street alongside covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking out from the train station canopy through the plaza toward the statue and historic buildings

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street in the distance

entered.detail: iron and glass canopy structure covering the station entrance
stone statue on tall pedestal in the center of the plaza
multi-story ornate building with lit windows dominating the skyline
black metal bench under the station canopy
cast iron lamp post with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a train station canopy with the character walking out into a cobblestone plaza at night. A prominent statue stands in the plaza center while a tall historic building with illuminated windows rises in the background. The character walks toward the statue then turns right to follow the street, passing a horse-drawn carriage in the distance.

events.description: enters covered walkway with shop signs and sandbags visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past various storefronts and NPCs

notable_agents.action: two men in suits leaning against the shop wall

entered.detail: overhead wooden and iron structure covering the sidewalk
painted sign reading TOBACCO on the shopfront
painted sign reading NEWSAGENT on the shopfront
stacks of sandbags outside the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial sidewalk sheltered by an overhead wooden structure. Shop signs for tobacco and newsagent are visible on the right, with sandbags and crates stacked outside. NPCs stand leaning against the walls as the character passes by.

events.description: passing theater building with bright illuminated marquee lights

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway past the theater entrance and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing near building entrance

entered.detail: ornate building facade with columns and bright marquee
string of warm light bulbs illuminating the theater entrance
stacked wooden crates and barrels on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character passes a theater building with a brightly lit marquee featuring rows of light bulbs. The covered walkway continues with wooden barrels stacked on the left. The lighting shifts as the character moves past the theater entrance where NPCs stand near the doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: newspaper office street approaching central plaza

events.description: passing the Saint Denis Times newspaper building with large signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the newspaper building toward a distant well-lit plaza with string lights overhead

entered.detail: building with large painted sign reading Saint Denis Times
festive string lights hanging across the street
grand building with bright facade lighting at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character passing the Saint Denis Times newspaper building on the left. The covered walkway recedes into the distance as the character approaches an open plaza decorated with overhead string lights. A large grand building with illuminated facades serves as the focal point ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open expanse of a train station plaza into the sheltered, lamp-lit corridors of a bustling city center. It begins under a station canopy, moving across a cobblestone plaza past a central statue and a towering historic building before turning right to follow the street. As the character enters a covered commercial sidewalk, the open air gives way to a wooden overhead structure lined with tobacco and newsagent signs, crates, and leaning NPCs. The scene then shifts past a theater with a brightly lit marquee and stacked barrels, with the warm glow of the entrance illuminating the path. Finally, the camera passes the Saint Denis Times building as the covered walkway recedes, opening up into a festive plaza decorated with overhead string lights and a grand illuminated facade.
